projects.name: GRDN
projects.note: iOS: exit-65 archive fix pushed (commit e27ba73, build 1.11.3+4) — the rive_native native library is now built on CI before the archive. Web: GRDN is already live and working on web at grdnapp.com — no deploy work needed.
projects.nextStep: Re-run the GRDN Xcode Cloud build to confirm the iOS archive fix.

projects.name: SCANDALS
projects.note: Capture method reworked (commit 259d922, 11 files) — the paper now goes flat on the floor BESIDE the foot instead of under it. On-screen guidance, the shot diagram, live detection, and the setup checklist were all rewritten for the new layout; paper detection now expects a full unoccluded rectangle. CV pipeline typechecks clean. Standard US Letter works for any foot size.
projects.nextStep: Take a test scan with the paper beside your foot (both flat on the floor, fully in frame, phone overhead) and check the measurement against a known size.

projects.name: HD-LOVE
projects.note: Go-live backend built on Supabase (commit 01cff66) — real email/password auth, profile photo upload to Supabase Storage, and a live candidate feed across the Romantic/Friends/Networking modes (incl. a fix to a matching bug that broke matches in DB mode, plus 20 seed profiles). Code is launch-ready (~95%); demo mode still works with no keys. docs/backend_setup.md has the full setup guide.
projects.nextStep: Stand up the backend: create a Supabase project, run supabase/schema.sql then seed.sql, set SUPABASE_URL + SUPABASE_ANON_KEY (GitHub Actions secrets for web, Xcode Cloud env vars for iOS), run 'flutter analyze' + 'flutter test'. Before App Store submission: add a 'Delete account' button (Apple requires it).

projects.name: irons-design
projects.note: Live on Cloudflare — resolving with valid SSL and the correct content.

projects.name: WEATHER
projects.note: App Store rejection (ITMS-90129) fixed; Mirror exercise now has a close button on every step. Code-complete at v1.3.0.
projects.nextStep: Confirm build 22 reached TestFlight and resubmit to App Store review.

projects.name: POSTURE
projects.note: Auto-capture (hands-free 4-view camera) shipped. Supabase keep-alive is running green — the project won't auto-pause anymore.
projects.nextStep: Smoke-test the auto-capture flow in Expo Go on your iPhone.

projects.name: Futon
projects.note: SRS mastery label standardized on 'Mastered' everywhere (commit 3f1060f, 6 files) — no 'Perfected' or 'Burned' text left anywhere in the UI. Homepage Progress section (rainbow SRS bars) shipped earlier.
projects.nextStep: Shipped — nothing pending. Optional: run 'flutter analyze' on your Mac to confirm (the sandbox has no Flutter SDK).

projects.name: PAPPY
projects.note: v2.5.10 (billing null-guard + crash fix) deployed to Firebase and live for users.

projects.name: irons-holistic
projects.note: Static recreation of irons.be deployed and live.

projects.name: PRIMAL
projects.note: On hold by your decision. This is the customer-facing 'Primal Moves' fitness-studio app (front-end built; Firebase + Stripe backend built and pushed). Paused to focus on the separate AI Voice Agent — the sales-agent MVP in the primal-agent repo. Distinct project from this one.

projects.name: AI Voice Agent
projects.note: Feature-complete in mock mode — foundation, dashboard, outbound campaign engine, and an interactive voice test harness all built and verified: typecheck clean, 42/42 tests pass, boots with no API keys. Try it now with 'npm run harness'. Everything buildable without external services is done. Repo: giddyuptiger/primal-agent (commit 96ded86).
projects.nextStep: Two things, both yours: (1) provisioning — Twilio + A2P 10DLC, Deepgram, TTS, Supabase, Resend, Claude key, a host (see docs/PROVISIONING.md; start the A2P registration first, it's the slowest); (2) decide the gym platform (Mindbody/F45) so the real booking adapter can be built.
